name: true
readme:
Short:        Return true value (OpenBSD)
Type:         util/cli
Architecture: m68k-amigaos >= 3.0
Uploader:     duncan (at) bowring (dot) us
Author:       The Regents of the University of California (ported by Duncan Bowring)
Version:      1.1

true - Return true value (OpenBSD)

Original author: The Regents of the University of California
Ported by Duncan Bowring using amiport (AI-assisted porting toolkit).
Project: https://github.com/bdgscotland/amiport

Cross-compiled with m68k-amigaos-gcc for AmigaOS 3.x (68000+).
Tested in FS-UAE with AmigaOS 3.1.

Usage:
  true

  Returns exit code 0 (success). Useful in AmigaDOS scripts with IF
  and in pipeline testing.

Examples:
  true                     ; returns RETURN_OK (0) always
  IF true EQ true          ; condition always true in scripts

Includes full source code (original POSIX and ported Amiga versions)
and PORT.md documenting every transformation applied.
porting_notes: Minimal port: 13 tests confirm correct exit code (0) under all invocations including with extra arguments (POSIX requires these be ignored). The only Amiga-specific change is the stack cookie and version string.
